options.title: Button
options.summary: Haptic feedback, roundess and other button options.

boolean.title: Automatically launch editor
boolean.summary: Automatically launch the editor on the long press action.

boolean.title: Automatically create buttons
boolean.summary: Will add new buttons to emty regions that are long pressed.

list.title: Haptic feedback on editor launch.
list.summary: Perform haptic feedback when the editor is opened.

list.title: Haptic feedback on flip.
list.summary: Perform Haptic feedback when flipped (swipe action).
